name: yadav-prakhar-github-io
description: Portfolio of Prakhar Yadav - building thoughtful, user-centric products with clean code and modern UX.

scripts.build:js: npx tsc js/main.ts --outDir js --module ESNext --target ES2020 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --allowSyntheticDefaultImports --strict false --skipLibCheck
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js

author: Prakhar Yadav
